executives.name: Akash Patel
executives.background: Mr. Patel has over 10 years of experience in corporate finance and accounting. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies in the resource and technology sectors.

executives.name: Alastair Short
executives.background: Former executive at various financial institutions.

tenure_dates.title: Independent Director, Vice Chairman of the Board, Chairman of the Audit Committee
Independent Director, Chair of Audit Committee

executives.name: Alex Ashby
executives.background: Head of Product Development at Global X Management Company LLC. Responsible for the design and management of the firm's ETF suite.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Director of Product Development

executives.name: Arvin Ramos
executives.background: Mr. Ramos holds a degree in commerce from the University of Windsor and is a member of the Chartered Professional Accountants of Ontario. He has over 15 years of experience in the mining industry and has served as CFO for several junior mining companies.

executives.name: Ashley Heppenstall
executives.background: Mr. Heppenstall has over 30 years of experience in the oil and gas and resource sectors. He was the President and CEO of Lundin Petroleum AB from 2002 to 2015.

executives.name: Brian West
executives.background: Mr. West has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since August 2021. Prior to joining Boeing, he was CFO of Refinitiv and Oscar Health.

executives.name: Catherine Reynolds
executives.background: Chairman and CEO of the Catherine B. Reynolds Foundation. Former CEO of Educap Inc.

executives.name: Chris Verrico
executives.background: Mr. Verrico has over 40 years of experience in the mining and exploration industry. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies, including Xiana Mining Inc. and various junior exploration companies. He has extensive experience in project management and corporate development.

executives.name: Christopher Lewis
executives.background: Mr. Lewis is a geologist with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, specifically in uranium exploration and development. He has been involved with GoviEx since its early stages and has led the exploration teams in Niger and Zambia.

executives.name: Christopher Wallace
executives.background: Mr. Wallace is a managing partner of Firstlight Capital and has over 30 years of experience in the investment industry. He has held senior positions with several Canadian investment dealers.

executives.name: Craig Glidden
executives.background: Craig Glidden is Executive Vice President and General Counsel. He joined GM in 2015 from LyondellBasell.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Dame Elizabeth Corley
executives.background: Elizabeth is the Senior Independent Director. She was formerly CEO of Allianz Global Investors and has extensive experience in the financial services industry.

executives.name: Daniel Tucker
executives.background: Mr. Tucker is executive vice president and chief financial officer of Southern Company. He previously served as executive vice president and chief financial officer of Georgia Power and has held various roles in finance and treasury since joining in 2003.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, CFO, and Treasurer; Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: David Billard
executives.background: David Billard is a P.Geo. and the Head of Exploration for Skyharbour. He is a geologist with over 35 years of experience in exploration and development, particularly in the Athabasca Basin. He has worked with companies like Cameco and JNR Resources.

executives.name: David Frydenlund
executives.background: Mr. Frydenlund has served as the Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary of Energy Fuels since 2012. He has been with the Company and its predecessors since 1997.

executives.name: Douglas Kirwin
executives.background: Mr. Kirwin is an independent geologist with over 45 years of international experience. He was previously Executive Vice President of Ivanhoe Mines Limited.

executives.name: George Kurtz
executives.background: George Kurtz is our co-founder and has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our board of directors since November 2011. From October 2009 to September 2011, Mr. Kurtz served as Worldwide Chief Technology Officer of McAfee, Inc., a computer security software company. Prior to that, Mr. Kurtz served in various other positions at McAfee, including Senior Vice President and General Manager, Risk Management from October 2005 to October 2009. Mr. Kurtz co-founded Foundstone, Inc., a worldwide security products and services company, and served as its Chief Executive Officer from October 1999 until its acquisition by McAfee in October 2004.

executives.name: Glenn Jardine
executives.background: Mr. Jardine is an experienced mining executive with over 35 years' experience in the mining industry. He has held senior executive and operational roles with companies including LionOre, Kimberley Rare Earths, and GR Engineering Services. He has extensive experience in project development and operations across a range of commodities including gold, nickel, and base metals.

executives.name: Henrik Henriksson
executives.background: CEO of H2 Green Steel. Former CEO of Scania.

executives.name: Howard Wenger
executives.background: Howard Wenger has served as President of Nextracker since February 2022. He previously held executive leadership roles at SunPower Corporation, including President of Business Units and President of SunPower Systems.

executives.name: Jack Miller
executives.background: Mr. Miller is the retired Chairman and CEO of North American Coffee Partnership. He has served on the board since 2016.

tenure_dates.title: COO, President, CEO, and Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: James Mattis
executives.background: General, U.S. Marine Corps (Retired). Former U.S. Secretary of Defense.

executives.name: James Reagan
executives.background: James G. Reagan has served as our Executive Vice President and General Counsel since 2017. Prior to joining Leidos, he was Senior Vice President and General Counsel at Vencore, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: James Turley
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Ernst & Young. He has served as Emerson's Chair of the Board since 2021.

executives.name: Jan van Eck
executives.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Van Eck Associates Corporation, Van Eck Securities Corporation, and Van Eck Absolute Return Advisers, Inc.

executives.name: Jeff Sine
executives.background: Jeff Sine has served as a member of our board of directors since 2022. He is the Co-Founder and Partner of The Raine Group.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Jennifer Maki
executives.background: Former CEO of Vale Canada and Executive Director of Vale Base Metals.

executives.name: Joanne Ferstman
executives.background: Ms. Ferstman is a corporate director with over 20 years of experience in the financial services sector.

executives.name: Luis Berruga
executives.background: Former CEO of Global X Management Company LLC. Previously served as COO and President.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Operating Officer and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Michael Berry
executives.background: Michael J. Berry has served as our Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since March 2020. Prior to joining NetApp, Mr. Berry served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of McAfee, LLC from February 2017 to March 2020. From September 2015 to January 2017, he served as Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer and Chief Operating Officer at FireEye, Inc.

executives.name: Michelle Hinchliffe
executives.background: Michelle Hinchliffe was a partner at KPMG for 36 years, where she held several leadership roles including UK Chair of Audit. She has extensive experience in auditing and financial services.

tenure_dates.title: Non-Executive Director, Board Audit Committee Chair

executives.name: Pamela Murphy
executives.background: Chief Executive Officer, Opportunity Network.

executives.name: Patrick Donnelly
executives.background: Mr. Donnelly was appointed Senior Vice President, Legal and Organizational Effectiveness in 2022. He joined Hudbay in 2008 and has served as General Counsel since 2011.

executives.name: Richard Cherry
executives.background: Mr. Cherry is a veteran executive in the nuclear industry, having served as President and CEO of Cotter Corporation and as a Vice President of General Atomics.

executives.name: Ronald Sugar
executives.background: Dr. Sugar is the former Chairman and CEO of Northrop Grumman Corporation, where he served from 2003 to 2010.

executives.name: Ryan O'Connor
executives.background: Chief Executive Officer of Global X Management Company LLC since April 2024. Previously held various leadership roles at Goldman Sachs Asset Management.

executives.name: Sandra Rivera
executives.background: Sandra Rivera is the CEO of Altera, an Intel Company. She previously served as Executive Vice President at Intel.

executives.name: Shaun Usmar
executives.background: Mr. Usmar is the Founder and CEO of Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp. and was previously CFO of Barrick Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Susan Ciccarone
executives.background: Independent Trustee. Managing Director at Kapitus. Previously at Goldman Sachs.

executives.name: Sébastien de Montessus
executives.background: Former President and CEO. He was terminated for cause in January 2024 following an investigation into an irregular payment instruction.

executives.name: Tom Arseneault
executives.background: Tom is President and CEO of BAE Systems, Inc. and an Executive Director of BAE Systems plc. He has held various senior leadership positions within the US business.

executives.name: Warren Gilman
executives.background: Chairman and CEO of Queen’s Road Capital Investment Ltd. Former Chairman and CEO of CEF Holdings.

executives.name: Wesley Bush
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Northrop Grumman Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Alastair Short
board_of_directors.background: Former executive at various financial institutions.
